task:
Two related fixes to global chrome:
1) HEADER+FOOTER: app/layout.tsx currently has Navbar and Footer commented out. Import { Navbar } from '@/components/navbar' and { Footer } from '@/components/foote
notes: Uncommented Navbar and Footer in layout, added top padding for fixed navbar (pt-16 md:pt-20) and bottom padding for sticky CTA (pb-24 md:pb-0). Created StickyCTA component with glassmorphism, two buttons (Call with Phone icon, Get Free Quote primary) visible only on mobile.
